endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/workspaceSettings
endpoints.description: Settings about where we should store your security data and logs. If the result is empty, it means that no custom-workspace configuration was set
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/workspaceSettings/{workspaceSettingName}
endpoints.description: Settings about where we should store your security data and logs. If the result is empty, it means that no custom-workspace configuration was set
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{WORKSPACESETTINGNAME}} with a real workspacesettingname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/workspaceSettings/{workspaceSettingName}
endpoints.description: creating settings about where we should store your security data and logs
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{WORKSPACESETTINGNAME}} with a real workspacesettingname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/workspaceSettings/{workspaceSettingName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the custom workspace settings for this subscription. new VMs will report to the default workspace
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{WORKSPACESETTINGNAME}} with a real workspacesettingname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/workspaceSettings/{workspaceSettingName}
endpoints.description: Settings about where we should store your security data and logs
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{WORKSPACESETTINGNAME}} with a real workspacesettingname.
